Package com.infernalsuite.asp.pdc

Class AdventurePersistentDataContainer

java.lang.Object
com.infernalsuite.asp.pdc.AdventurePersistentDataContainer
All Implemented Interfaces:
io.papermc.paper.persistence.PersistentDataContainerView, org.bukkit.persistence.PersistentDataAdapterContext, org.bukkit.persistence.PersistentDataContainer
public class AdventurePersistentDataContainer extends Object implements org.bukkit.persistence.PersistentDataContainer, org.bukkit.persistence.PersistentDataAdapterContext
